Name: PLURSL_SELECT_MENU_PARAM
Description: Parameter set defining a selectable menu entry with associated costs, conditions, and event triggers.

Fields.Name: Display Text ID
Fields.Description: ID referencing the text entry displayed in the menu UI.

Fields.Name: Soul Cost on Selection
Fields.Description: Amount of soul resource consumed when this option is selected.

Fields.Name: Selection Kick Event ID
Fields.Description: Event ID triggered when this menu option is selected.

Fields.Name: Visibility Check Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag ID used to determine whether this option should be shown.

Fields.Name: Visibility Flag State Type
Fields.Description: Defines the flag state condition that controls whether this item is hidden or shown.
